title: Garlicky, Dense German Potato Pasta
description: A comforting German dish featuring a rich pasta-water emulsion, made with a hint of vanilla sugar and a dense blend of potatoes and garlic.

ingredients.name: pasta
ingredients.notes: preferably a dense German egg pasta

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
While the pasta cooks, melt the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook, stirring occasionally, until they're tender and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
If using vanilla sugar, add it to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Remove the cooked pasta from the water with a slotted spoon and add it to the saucepan with the potato mixture.
Toss the pasta in the saucepan with the potato mixture until it's well coated.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and milk until smooth.
Add the flour mixture to the saucepan and continue to cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Season the pasta with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
